content: connector-mitre imports 4 MITRE datasets: Enterprise (222 techniques + 475 sub-techniques as of v16.1 Apr 2025), Mobile ATT&CK, ICS ATT&CK, CAPEC. Total attack-pattern objects across all matrices estimated 600-900+ (techniques + sub-techniques across Enterprise+Mobile+ICS). Initial import documented as 'several minutes'. CONNECTOR_RUN_AND_TERMINATE=false means connector stays running and re-imports per MITRE_INTERVAL (default 7 days). Connector uses OPENCTI_URL + OPENCTI_TOKEN for auth.
